ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-29-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeanette Fisher-Kouadio in Propria Persona.

Ms. Fisher-Kouadio reported that the petition for final distribution was filed and a hearing date set for September 1, 2015. The status of filing a petition for final distribution is off calendar.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-29-2015 Continued To Jul-29-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-27-2015 Continued To Jun-29-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeanette Fisher-Kouadio (administrator) in Propria Persona.

Ms. Fisher-Kouadio reported that the property has not sold, that the tenant has not moved and that she will need an additional 45 days for filing. The status on filing a petition for final distribution was continued to June 29, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Mar-11-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeannette Fisher-Kouadio (administrator) in Propria Persona.

Ms. Fisher-Kouadio stated that she had submitted a report on the status of administration, gave a history of the case indicating that no one would agree to act as administrator, there was a drop in value of the property, that the 50% heir of the surviving spouse provided financial supplementation where the estate was short, that the rent is now covering the mortgage, that the property value has increased and they are now looking at distribution. Ms. Fisher Kouadio also stated that the petition for final distribution could be filed in 3 weeks and inquired about her request for prior approval to be the broker on the sale of the property. The court will take the request for prior approval to be the broker under submission, and the report on status of administration was continued to April 27, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of a petition for final distribution.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
